leadText: Crescent Isle (Japanese: 弓形の島 Crescent Island) is a Hoenn location first seen in Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire. It is only accessible by soaring on Latios/Latias and is to the south of Ever Grande City. This crescent shaped island appears randomly at the start of the day or when it is received from passersby.

sections.title: Items
sections.text: Items [ edit | edit source ] Item Location Games Stardust At the northeast end of the island OR AS Heart Scale In the southwest corner of the island (randomly hidden) OR AS Deep Sea Scale In the southwest corner of the island (randomly hidden) OR AS Deep Sea Tooth In the southwest corner of the island (randomly hidden) OR AS Razor Claw In the southwest corner of the island (randomly hidden) OR AS Razor Fang In the southwest corner of the island (randomly hidden) OR AS

sections.title: Special encounters
sections.text: Special encounters [ edit | edit source ] Generation VI [ edit | edit source ] In the center area of Isle is a "mysterious ring" hovering in the air, through which the player can encounter a Cresselia .
